name: Florida Fruit Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 Pineapple, fresh, cored and diced 1/4 inch
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients together in a large bowl.
2. Refrigerate overnight.
Serve with anything...very good with grilled fish, grilled chicken, as a party dip, and even as a sandwich spread for grilled pork or beef.
